title: HeadsDeathban
description: An Simple Plugin where if a Player Dies, they'll get Banned and Drop an Head, With which they can also be Unbanned.
body:
HeadsDeathban is an Simple Plugin, which makes it so Dying is more of a Hustle, as when Players Die, they get Banned.
When Dying, a Player drops their Head. This is an Important twist to the usual Deathban plugins, as the Head can be used to Revive/Unban the Player respective to the Head.
Players can only get Revived/Unbanned while an Full-Moon Night.
To see the current stage of the Moon, when it is night and when the next Full-Moon is, type "?moon" or simply "moon" in Chat.
To Revive an Player place the Head onto the ground, After Reviving the Head gets Deleted.
The Head can't be put into Ender-Chests, is immune to Burning and has an Glow-Effect when Dropped.

-------

For Admins:
to unban, don't do /pardon as it wont work.
Instead use "unban [name]" just Simply as an Message in Chat.

OP's also can't be banned through dying, this can also be changed in the config.
If you use any Permission-System this can also be applied through the Permission "deathban.bypass", which can also be changed.

Instead of needing OP, all Admin Commands and Actions can be accessed through the permission "deathban.admin", this can't be changed.
